title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Plugins Without a Payment Processor
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria trying to sell plugins, but PayPal and Stripe have blocked you. You're tired of looking for workarounds and want a reliable solution. You need a payment system that can handle your transactions without hassle. But where do you turn? You've likely explored various options, but none have fully met your needs. It's time to examine the real choices available to you and choose the one that best fits your situation.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's break down the real options available to you: Gumroad, Payhip, and the Core Shop Engine from Unchained Commerce. Gumroad allows you to upload your plugin and set a price, but it takes a commission on each sale. Payhip provides a platform for selling digital products, but it also charges a transaction fee. The Core Shop Engine is a backend system that provides automated delivery, payment verification, and no payment processor account is required, offering a flat fee of $49.99. Each option has its pros and cons, but they all cater to different needs.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Unfortunately, Gumroad and Payhip have restrictions on certain countries, including Nigeria, due to banking limitations and KYC requirements. This means you're unable to access these platforms or sell your plugins using them. The Core Shop Engine, however, offers a solution by partnering with NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports 300+ coins and doesn't require KYC, making it accessible to creators in restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, Gumroad and Payhip typically take 2-3 business days to process transactions. The Core Shop Engine offers instant automated delivery, ensuring your customers receive their plugins quickly. Fees are another aspect to consider: Gumroad charges a commission of 3.5-8%, while Payhip charges a transaction fee of 2.9% + 30¢. The Core Shop Engine has a flat fee of $49.99, making it a cost-effective option in the long run.
The Core Shop Engine's flat fee of $49.99 is a one-time payment, with no subscription or recurring fees.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is key to streamlining your sales process, and the Core Shop Engine delivers. With automated delivery, you can set up your shop once and let the system handle the rest. This frees up your time to focus on creating more plugins and growing your business. Gumroad and Payhip require manual intervention, which can be time-consuming and prone to errors.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Your choice ultimately depends on your specific needs and circumstances. If you're looking for a cost-effective solution that works with your location and provides instant automated delivery, the Core Shop Engine is likely your best bet. If you prefer the convenience of a platform that handles everything for you, Gumroad or Payhip might be a better fit. Take your time to weigh the pros and cons of each option and choose the one that best suits your business goals.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
You can use the Core Shop Engine to sell other digital products, such as ebooks, courses, or software, beyond just plugins.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

Selling plugins is just one aspect of your business. Consider using the Core Shop Engine to sell other digital products, such as ebooks, courses, or software. You can also explore other revenue streams, like affiliate marketing or sponsored content. The possibilities are endless when you have a reliable payment system in place.
Your Action Checklist

Before making your final decision, consider the following steps: 1. Research the Core Shop Engine's features and pricing to ensure it meets your business needs. 2. Set up a test shop to familiarize yourself with the platform. 3. Create a plan for promoting your plugins and attracting customers. 4. Review the terms and conditions of the Core Shop Engine and NOWPayments to ensure you understand their policies. 5. Set a realistic goal for your first sale and work towards achieving it.
The Core Shop Engine integrates with NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports 300+ coins and doesn't require KYC.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
